content:
# Multiobjective Differential Evolution

**Summary**: An evolutionary algorithm used to find a set of optimal solutions (Pareto front) for problems with multiple conflicting objectives.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2014]] used multiobjective differential evolution to optimize well placement and production rates simultaneously.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The Pareto-based approach yielded superior results in both NPV and VIR compared to the weighted sum technique across all scenarios. ([[2014-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2014, p. 86]])
